raw_text: europass work experience 01/03/2021 - 30/09/2021 - rhode-saint-genese, belgium training student von karman institute for fluid dynamics the work done, consists in model, predict and test the aerodynamics effects and the noise generated by the interaction between a propeller and a distortion of the potential flow generated by it. the work has involved both an analytical part (which has been developed throught the use of matlab and xfoil), and an experimental one, and the maria chiara achievement was to compare the results of both. fasinella 01/11/2018 - 01/04/2019 - bari, italy, italy date of birth: 22/02/1997 training student nationality: italian d.e.s. innovation gender: female worked for six months in a training program, for a company of diagnostic engineering solution, aimed at analyze and measuring difects in a layered material specimen through the utilization of various thermography thecniques and the postprocessing of the contact acquired infrared signals. q street rosario livatino, 15, 01/01/2017 - 07/2019 bachelor's degree polytechnic university of bari bachelor's degree in mechanical engineering. my instruction has involved the study of both fields of cold and hot mechanics, but also the base knowledge of the industrial engineering, such as the economical ones. the final dissertation is in mechanical measurements and has been carried out during the training program in d.e.s innovation company. field(s) of study engineering, manufacturing and construction bachelor analysis of post-processing techniques of layered materials by means of thermography 09/2019 - current master's degree polytechnic university of bari attending the master's degree course in aeronautical engineering. the path provides the acquisition of knowledges in aerodynamics and propulsion, cfd, turbomachinery, energy sistems, mechanical plants, and mechanical manufacturing. the final dissertation is in mechanical sensors and measurements, carried out during the training program at von karman institute. field(s) of study o engineering, manufacturing and construction master's degree aerodynamics and acoustic installations effects in novel urban air mobility aircraft concepts bachelor's degree conservatory of music of bari field(s) of study o piano bachelor's degree language skills mother tongue(s): italian other language(s): english listening reading spoken spoken writing c1 c2 production interaction c1 c2 c2 french listening reading spoken spoken writing b2 b2 production interaction b2 b2 b2 spanish listening reading spoken spoken writing a2 b1 production interaction al a2 a2 digital skills microsoft office / autodesk autocad (optimal knowledge) / good familiarity with matlab, simulink / xfoil / ftool work skills social skills (adaptable and flexible sociable team work work ethic) / le adership: team building, team management, team motivation. / proble m analysis & problem solving technical skills aerodynamics / data post-processing procedures / gasdynamics / cf d-analysis / electronic signals measurements / national instruments / manufacturing process / turbomachinery fluid dynamics / sensors and transducers
